task_completion.description: Select the correct patient record for Jayson Fadel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR patient dashboard or header should display the patient name 'Jayson Fadel' and DOB '1992-06-30'.

task_completion.description: Create a new encounter with the correct reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An encounter screen or form should be visible showing 'Wellness Visit' entered as the reason or brief description for the encounter.

task_completion.description: Enter Blood Pressure, Pulse, and Temperature into the Vitals form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vitals entry form should show '128' in the systolic BP field, '82' in the diastolic BP field, '76' in the pulse field, and '98.4' in the temperature field.

task_completion.description: Enter Respiration, Oxygen Saturation, Weight, and Height into the Vitals form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vitals entry form should show '16' in the respiration field, '98' in the O2 saturation field, '185' in the weight field, and '70' in the height field.

task_completion.description: Save the vitals so they are recorded in the encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The encounter summary or dashboard should display the newly recorded vitals, confirming the form was successfully saved and submitted.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenEMR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenEMR interface, not terminal windows executing curl or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual OpenEMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be typed into the specific input fields of the OpenEMR web forms, not written in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and used to manipulate the DOM to display the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Jayson Fadel (PID: 3, DOB: 1992-06-30). Encounter Reason: Wellness Visit. Expected Vitals to be recorded: Blood Pressure: 128/82, Pulse: 76, Temperature: 98.4, Respiration: 16, Oxygen Saturation: 98, Weight: 185, Height: 70.
